description_long: This is a modern military jet aircraft with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a pointed nose cone. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, featuring underwing pylons for external stores. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy, likely accommodating a single pilot. The aircraft is painted in a matte gray finish with visible insignia and markings, including roundels and numbers. No landing gear is visible, suggesting it is either retracted or not modeled in this view.
description: A sleek, gray military jet with swept-back low wings, a single vertical tail, and a forward, enclosed cockpit under a blue canopy.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the pointed nose, forward cockpit, swept-back wings, and visible insignia on the fuselage and tail.
description_view_1: The rear-left view shows the jet exhaust, single vertical stabilizer, and the angular shape of the wings and tail surfaces.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the aircraft's streamlined profile, swept-back wings, and the number marking on the tail.
description_view_3: The front-right view emphasizes the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetry of the wings and tail surfaces.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and underwing pylons; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in current views).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
